hero.headline: When Your Power Goes Out, *We Turn It Back On*
hero.subheadline: Fort Myers electrical repairs done right the first time. No endless estimates or empty promises.

services_section.label: THE FIXES
services_section.heading: Every outlet, panel, and wire — handled
services_section.subheading: From flickering lights to dead circuits, we fix what's broken

services.title: Circuit Breaker Repairs
services.description: Tripping breakers driving you crazy? We'll find what's overloading your system and get it running smooth again.

services.title: Outlet & Switch Fixes
services.description: Dead outlets, loose switches, sparking connections — the basics that need to work every single time.

services.title: Panel Upgrades
services.description: Old panels can't handle modern demands. We'll upgrade your electrical heart to keep everything flowing.

services.title: Wiring Repairs
services.description: Bad wiring isn't just annoying — it's dangerous. We'll rewire what needs fixing and test everything twice.

about.heading: Fort Myers electrical work that sticks
about.body: We're the team that shows up when your electrical system decides to quit. No runaround, no mystery fees — just honest repairs that solve the problem for good. Fort Myers homes and businesses count on us when the lights go out.

reviews.name: Josephine V.
reviews.text: Completely satisfied with their repair work. Got the job done right.

service_areas.label: COVERAGE AREA
service_areas.heading: Serving Southwest Florida
service_areas.subheading: Fast electrical repairs throughout the region

cta.heading: Power problems won't fix themselves
cta.body: Call now and get your electrical issues handled today. No waiting around for callbacks or scheduling nightmares.
